response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and microservices, but lacks direct evidence of building or leading multi-agent AI systems in production. His fintech exposure is minimal, and his recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP) is promising but not yet at the scale or regulatory rigor required for the role. Leadership experience is present but not at the executive level for a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems expertise with experience in real-time, low-latency systems.
Strong engineering leadership in scaling teams and implementing disciplined development practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Proven ability to work across full-stack and multiple languages, adapting to project needs.
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes environments.
Limited fintech infrastructure experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, embedded finance).
Lack of executive-level leadership experience in venture-backed or high-growth scale-ups.
